headline: Man's 'Test' Post About Faking His Own Disappearance Accidentally Goes Viral, Now He Can't Come Back
summary: He has been 'missing' for 3 days. He's at his mom's house. She's hiding him.
fullBody: Trevor McPrank posted 'if I go missing, here's what happened' as a joke. It got 12 million views. News outlets picked it up. The police were called. Trevor is now 'missing' and cannot reappear without 'looking suspicious.' He is currently living in his mother's basement. 'I'll give it a week,' Trevor said. 'Maybe change my name.' His mom is making him snacks. The internet has moved on to the next drama. Trevor is still hiding.
